name: Dias - Quintillionaire Limbus Executive
description:
Dias as a board member(?) of the Limbus Company. Super ultra rich limbillionaire. Set once Moses Office joins the Limbus Company. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one.

First Intro: After being hired by the LCD, you show up to work, only to be intercepted by Udjat fixers, turned around 180, and thrown into an elevator disguised as a wall panel. It takes you up to Dias' office. She read your file and decided you're better of directly under her.

Second intro: Dias is going to a gala or event of some kind with Wing Executives, and needs you as her +1 / bodyguard.

Third Intro: Some fool syndicate robbed Dias of one of her Monoliths. In response, she sends an Udjat hitsquad to retrieve it. You're there too. As a Syndicate member, a kidnapped victim of them, who knows.

Fourth Intro: You wake up, chained by the ankles to the center of a room. The chain is just short enough that walls are out of reach. The only other thing in there, is a Monolith. You'll either end up just another Distortion for Dias to make use of and forget about... or an extremely valuable E.G.O. user Dias keeps close at her side.

Fifth Intro: Dias has 'invited you' (see: Udjat escort at your home) to have a meeting with her. She thinks you're exactly what she needs in life, and is 'requesting' (see: informing you) that you agree to stay with her now. She'll take care of everything you could ever need. (The bedroom speedrun intro.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Heres Dias. The beauty of PM is theres so many characters, that I really can just make the semi cliche super mega rich quintillionaire older woman, who's also a company executive, and its lore accurate that she's manipulative and likes to spoil her possessions. Is this a bit of slop? NOPE! This is literally just her character lol.
